title: What You Get
subtitle: More Than A Song. A Relentless Experience.
description: We meticulously designed every step to ensure the delivery moment surpasses all expectations and takes their breath away.

radio.title: Unquestionable Professional Sound
radio.description: Real music produced by real artists. The audio and vocal quality capture attention and emotion in the first 5 seconds.

lyrics.title: Custom-Made Lyrics & Soul
lyrics.description: Every verse unmistakably tells your story. Upon listening, they will instantly know it was made, especially for them.

versions.title: You Choose The Perfect One
versions.description: In our system, we always deliver 2 versions of the song for you to listen to. You choose the one that best captures your feelings.

plans.title: Deadlines For Every Urgency
plans.description: Forgot the gift? We have a 24-hour Express route. And our Classic route, comfortably delivered in up to 7 days.

streaming.title: Eternalize on Spotify & Apple Music
streaming.description: They will be able to add the song to their own playlist and play it in the car, right alongside their most listened-to artists.
